content:
清晓对镜洗梳妆，眉间花钿颜色消。
“哎~眉间花钿黯淡…守密人可愿为妾身重绘花钿？”
“食物、玩具、指鹿为马的权力？妾身自会为你奉上这些世间最好的回礼。”

🎑 守密人会为徐画上怎样的花钿呢？漂亮的花钿将会获得徐的谢礼——200银芯兑换码，欢迎大家在评论区分享。
注意：花钿需要画在徐的眉心。
——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——
V2.4.2 Help Her with Makeup...
In the pale light of dawn, she sits before the mirror to dress; the vermilion of the floral ***Huadian*** mark upon her brow has begun to wither.
“Ah… the ***Huadian*** between my eyes has grown dim. My dear Keeper, would you be so kind as to paint it anew?”
“Riches, playthings, or perhaps the power to turn a lie into truth? I shall provide the finest of worldly rewards in return for your artistry.”

🎑 What kind of mark will you paint for her? A mark of true elegance will earn her favor—a [200 Silver] Redemption Code. Share your designs in the comments!
Note: The ***Huadian*** (makeup mark) must be drawn precisely at the center of her brow.

Whither art thou, Bokrug?
Forsaken to the profundus of the abzu?
Cast aloft amidst the cosmic array?
Lockede within Light's closet?
Whither art thou, Bokrug?
